'''[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] Ravein''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who represented [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] and the [[Alderaan sector/Legends|Alderaan sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was the father of [[Kayala Ravein]]. His daughter idolized him as a child, but eventually came to see him as a foolish compromiser with the corruption of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. She became a vigilante behind his back, using her social life as his daughter as cover.
